one_time_description: Purchase of 100% of outstanding shares of Echo Bay Development Ltd. during the year
economic_notes: Nation has investments in T'Se'Kame' Forestry Ltd., T'Se'Kame' Forestry Limited Partnership, Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group GP Ltd., Musgamagw Dzawada'enuxw Fisheries Group LP, and Echo Bay Development Ltd. Work in progress includes a Health/Admin building ($1,428,252) and a hybrid solar plant ($329,046).
notes: Audit is qualified due to inability to obtain sufficient audit evidence over investments in T'Se'Kame' Forestry Ltd., T'Se'Kame' Forestry LP, and Echo Bay Development Ltd. (total investments reported at $919,050). Significant prior period restatements to March 31, 2020 figures for unaccrued invoices and undeferred restricted funding. Financial statements were signed February 26, 2024 for the year ended March 31, 2021, indicating a nearly 3-year delay. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($1,450,875) + Government of Canada ($13,675) + Province of BC ($647,421) + FNHA ($1,538,063) = $3,649,034. OSR includes Gaming Revenue Sharing LP, Interfor, Rental Income, Interest Income, GBE income, and Other Revenue. Salaries per Schedule 1 total $339,428 but expenses by object shows $339,223; segment disclosure figure used for segment analysis.
